text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's time for Daiwa Scarlet's debut race.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: At last, I'm going to enter the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I can't wait! Let's go! My legs are itching to run!
choice_data_list: Go get that number one spot, you hear?
Go get that number one spot, you hear?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You don't need to remind me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll have the most spectacular debut there ever
was. Everyone will wish they could copy me!
